name: ACES
tagline: The orange Shuttle pressure suit worn after Challenger made shirtsleeve ascent unacceptable
description: Full-pressure launch-entry suit developed by David Clark Company. Replaced the earlier Launch Entry Suit (LES) starting in 1994. Detachable gloves, parachute harness integrated, distinctive international-orange colour for water-recovery visibility. Worn on every Space Shuttle ascent and re-entry through STS-135 in 2011.
best_known_for: The orange "pumpkin" suit worn for every Space Shuttle launch and re-entry after Challenger
